name: Barley, Potato and Amaranth Stew (r T)
recipeIngredient: 1 large potato, peeled and chopped into bite-sized pieces
1/2 teaspoon garlic powder, or to taste
2 cups water, to cover; keep adding water as necessary
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the crockpot.
2. Set the crockpot to low and turn it on.
3. Add water gradually until the mixture is thick enough to resemble a stew.
4. Season with salt at the end, after transferring the stew to a bowl.
5. Serve with cracked wheat bread for a complete meal.
